title: TapLeaf Inclusion Proofs
description: TapLeaf inclusion proofs provide the Merkle sibling hashes needed to prove that a revealed tapscript leaf belonged to the TapTree committed by a Taproot output. They are the evidence that links one script-path spend to the hidden tree committed at creation time.

resources.title: BIP 341: Taproot
resources.notes: Formal witness rules for proving a tapleaf was part of the committed TapTree.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Schnorr/Taproot Workshop
resources.notes: Workshop module 2.4 walks through spending with one script and providing proof it was in the committed tree.
